name: 11q24_Jacobsen_syndrome
description: Jacobsen syndrome (11q23-q25 terminal deletion). Variable-size terminal deletions (7-20 Mb) often with breakpoints in the FRA11B folate-sensitive fragile site (CCG)n repeat at FRA11B/CBL2 proximal to the syndrome region. Phenotype: thrombocytopenia (Paris-Trousseau, FLI1 LoF), ID, cardiac defects, characteristic facies. Subtelomeric 11qter SD blocks mediate a subset of breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: FRA11B (CBL2/CCG-repeat fragile site at 11q23.3) is the major recurrent breakpoint; distal SD cluster at 11qter mediates additional events. Critical dosage-sensitive genes: FLI1 (thrombocytopenia), ETS1 (cardiac), RICS, NRGN, BARX2, KCNJ1.
